---
title: "Data Cleaning Challenge"
author: "Manolo Vasquez Mendoza"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    page-layout: full
    title-block-banner: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: body
    number-sections: false
    html-math-method: katex
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-copy: hover
    code-tools:
        source: false
        toggle: true
        caption: See code
execute: 
  warning: false
    
---
### Importing data
```{python}

import kagglehub
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = kagglehub.dataset_download("ahmedmohamed2003/cafe-sales-dirty-data-for-cleaning-training")

import os
csv_file = [f for f in os.listdir(df) if f.endswith('.csv')][0]
df = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(df, csv_file))
df_clean = df.copy()
df_clean
```
### Set N/As and accurate data types
```{python}

df_clean = df_clean.replace(["ERROR","UNKNOWN"], np.nan)
columns = {
  "Item":str,
  "Quantity":float,
  "Price Per Unit":float,
  "Total Spent":float,
  "Payment Method":str,
  "Location":str,
  "Transaction Date":"datetime64[ns]"
  }
df_clean = df_clean.astype(columns)
df_clean = df_clean.replace(["nan"], np.nan)
df_clean
```
### Fill N/As
```{python}

fill_values = {
    "Item": "Various",
    "Quantity": df_clean["Quantity"].mean().round(0),
    "Price Per Unit": df_clean["Price Per Unit"].mean().round(0),
    "Payment Method": df_clean["Payment Method"].ffill(),
    "Total Spent": df_clean["Total Spent"].mean().round(0),
    "Location": "other",
    "Transaction Date": df_clean.sort_values("Transaction Date", ascending=True)["Transaction Date"].ffill()
}
df_clean = df_clean.fillna(fill_values)

df_clean
```
